exam_format: Computer-based testing (CBT), fixed-form. 100-150 questions depending on exam. Scaled scoring (390 passing out of 500).

testing_centers.provider: PSI or NHA-approved test centers / online proctoring
testing_centers.notes: Most exams are computer-based (linear fixed-form). Some available via live remote proctoring. NCCA accredited. Results often immediate or within days.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required at check-in. Must match name on registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed book. No notes, phones, or reference materials. Calculators provided on-screen if needed. Follow all test center or remote proctoring rules.
renewal_options: Every 2 years via online portal. Requires 10 continuing education (CE) credits per cycle. CE can be earned through NHA courses or approved providers. Renewal fee applies.
recommended_experience: Completed a phlebotomy technician training or education program within the last 5 years and have performed a minimum of thirty (30) venipunctures and ten (10) capillary or finger sticks on live individuals

prerequisites.description: Possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency

Completed a phlebotomy technician training or education program within the last 5 years and have performed a minimum of thirty (30) venipunctures and ten (10) capillary or finger sticks on live individuals

retake_policy.notes: Full exam fee charged for each retake. No limit specified beyond waiting period.

official_study_resources.title: CPT Online Study Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Provides contemporary learning tools such as interactive games, quizzes, flashcards, and professionalism tips from experts in the field

official_study_resources.title: CPT Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Get up to six attempts on a phlebotomy practice test (based on actual exam)

official_study_resources.title: CPT Preparation Package
official_study_resources.notes: Includes robust interactive study materials and a phlebotomy study guide, along with the phlebotomy practice test

official_study_resources.title: CPT Test Plan
official_study_resources.notes: This free study aide maps out key concepts you will see on the CPT exam

official_study_resources.title: NHA Mobile
official_study_resources.notes: Empowering learner success with study-on-the-go flashcards aligned to your enrolled NHA course
